parties.name: NEPTUNE SOCIETY OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA 1 LORAINE COURT SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94118

calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Outcalf from Neptune Society of Northern California.

Mr. Outcalt stated that an order establishing fact of fetal death was needed because at the time of death (2/16/11) there was a misunderstanding between the funeral home and the hospital, that the State requires that a fetal death certificate be registered within one year of time of death, that they just received the fetal death certificate two weeks ago and that an order is required to get the certificate registered with the State. The Petition to Establish Fact of Death was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
